evidence: Adhere resonates most with physical/material interactions (ontological.material), relational dynamics between entities (ontological.relational), and predictable adherence patterns (lawfulness.predictable). It also involves mutual resonance between entities (interconnection.resonant) and functional utility (value_generation.functional). Sensory perception (epistemological.perception) and embodied experience (epistemological.experience) are key to observing adherence in motion. Symmetry.generative and symmetry.inclusive reflect how adhesion creates new paths or absorbs into processes.

The highest scores reflect 'carry out' as an action that persists over time (temporal.continuation 3), creates outcomes (symmetry.generative 3), operates practically (value.functional 3), and follows cause-effect chains (interconnection.chained 3). Its superficial resonance (3) and predictability (3) align with routine, physical movement through processes.

Continuation strongly resonates with temporal.continuation (10) as it directly denotes ongoing persistence. It scores high in resonance.essential (8) because it touches the core essence of sustained existence. Symmetry.generative (6) reflects its role in producing ongoing processes. Lawfulness.predictable (7) because continuation is expected to follow patterns. Value.functional (7) as it provides practical utility in maintaining processes.

The word 'continue' strongly resonates with temporal.continuation (ongoing persistence) and lawfulness.predictable (regular, expected action). It also weakly connects to scale.individual (applying to personal actions), epistemological.experience (embodied knowing of persistence), ontological.relational (interactions in proceeding), interconnection.chained (part of cause-effect sequences), resonance.structural (pattern-level persistence), symmetry.cyclical (part of recurring actions), and value_generation.functional (practical utility).

Embark strongly resonates with temporal.emergence (starting a journey), catalytic interconnection (triggering change), and essential resonance (core of initiation). It aligns with generative and transformative symmetry (creating new paths and change), functional value (practical utility), and experiential creation/discovery (beginning new endeavors).

The highest scores reflect direct ties to physical movement (ontological.material), sensory awareness of motion (epistemological.perception), and lived experience of speed/dynamic action (epistemological.experience). Scores for 'catalytic' and 'generative' symmetry acknowledge how movement can trigger change or create momentum, while 'functional' value highlights practical utility in describing motion.

The phrase 'follow out' resonates most strongly with the **resonance.essential** (core movement through a process) and **symmetry.transformative** (catalyzing progress) slots. It also aligns with **ontological.material** (physical movement) and **value_generation.functional** (practical utility of proceeding). Scores are low elsewhere due to its narrow focus on literal/procedural movement, avoiding abstract or obstructive connotations.

The highest scores reflect 'follow through' as an individual action (scale.individual) that requires sustained effort (temporal.continuation) and structural completion (ontological.structural). Its resonance with 'essential' (resonance.essential) stems from its core role in achieving outcomes, while 'functional' value (value_generation.functional) highlights its practical utility in seeing tasks to completion.

The highest scores reflect 'follow up' as a continuation of action (temporal.continuation), operating on individual/community scales, and involving relational dynamics. It resonates with generative symmetry (producing new steps) and functional value (practical utility). Lower scores reflect its lack of permanence, cosmic scale, or existential resonance.

Follow-through strongly resonates with temporal.continuation (7) as it implies ongoing persistence. It aligns with scale.individual (5) for personal commitment and epistemological.experience (7) as it's an embodied action. Ontological.semantic (5) reflects its conceptual meaning of completion, while value_generation.functional (7) underscores its practical utility in achieving outcomes.

Follow-up as a noun in the SOC.pass context (proceeding through a process) strongly resonates with interconnection.chained (sequence dependency), value_generation.functional (practical utility), and lawfulness.predictable (expected continuation). Moderate scores reflect its relational/structural role in processes and generative/transformational dynamics, while lower scores align with its non-existential, non-material nature and lack of ethical/aesthetic value.

Followup strongly resonates with continuation (temporal) and chained processes (interconnection), as it inherently implies proceeding through a sequence. It operates at individual/community scales and within informational/structural layers. Its generative and transformative symmetry scores reflect its role in creating next steps and driving progress.

The word 'go' strongly resonates with the material layer (physical movement), generative symmetry (creating movement), individual scale (common usage), and essential resonance (core of moving). It also connects moderately with predictable lawfulness and functional value.

The phrase 'go by' strongly resonates with temporal.continuation (time passing), ontological.material (physical movement), and lawfulness.predictable (routine motion). It also connects weakly to spatial scales (individual/community movement) and functional value (practical utility).

The phrase 'go forward' strongly resonates with individual action (scale.individual), physical movement (ontological.material), and practical utility (value_generation.functional). It also connects to ongoing persistence (temporal.continuation), lived experience (epistemological.experience), and the core essence of movement (resonance.essential). The symmetry slots (transformative, generative) reflect its role in enabling progress, while its predictability aligns with common actions.

The phrase 'go past' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material), individual agency (scale.individual), and predictable action (lawfulness.predictable). It connects to catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic) and generative progress (symmetry.generative). The action's sensory observability (epistemological.perception) and embodied nature (epistemological.experience) further ground its resonance.

The word 'go through' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material), individual-scale actions (scale.individual), and practical utility (value_generation.functional). It also aligns with the lived experience of navigating processes (epistemological.experience) and predictable motion (lawfulness.predictable). The essential resonance (resonance.essential) reflects its core essence of spatial or situational traversal, while symmetry.transformative captures its role in catalyzing change.

The word 'head' (as a noun) resonates most strongly with physical presence (ontological.material), individual scale (scale.individual), and practical utility (value_generation.functional). It weakly connects to perception (seeing the head move) and identification (naming the body part). The catalytic role (leading movement) and superficial resonance (surface-level action) also score moderately.

The verb 'head' (to proceed/move through) strongly resonates with physical/material action (ontological.material), individual agency (scale.individual), and bodily experience (epistemological.experience). It implies predictable continuation (lawfulness.predictable) and functional utility (value.functional). Structural patterns (ontological.structural) and causal chains (interconnection.chained) emerge in contexts like following paths. The action's transformative potential (symmetry.transformative) and dependency on conditions (lawfulness.contingent) further ground its resonance.

The word 'heading' (as a noun in the SOC.pass sense) strongly resonates with temporal continuation (ongoing movement), material ontology (physical direction), and functional value (practical utility). It weakly connects to perception/experience (embodied motion), scale (individual/community movement), and superficial resonance (basic directional intent). Scores remain low elsewhere due to lack of direct alignment with obstruction (symmetric pair) or abstract concepts.

Implement strongly resonates with functional value (practical utility), transformative symmetry (catalyzing change), structural ontology (organizational patterns), and chained interconnection (cause-effect chains). It also aligns with societal scale and material/relational layers. Scores drop to 0 or minimal for abstract or non-operational contexts.

Implementation resonates most with structural organization (ontological.structural 6), catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic 5), and predictable processes (lawfulness.predictable 6). Its core ties to functional value (8) reflect its practical utility, while lower scores align with its operational nature without inherent ethical or existential depth.

The 'liberty chit' resonates most with functional utility (physical tool enabling movement), individual scale (personal use), and catalytic interconnection (enabling passage). Its material form and generative role in creating permission align with SOC.pass's 'proceeding' theme. Lower scores reflect its limited scope beyond practical application and lack of deeper existential or systemic resonance.

The word 'limp' (as a noun in the SOC.pass context) strongly resonates with physical/material existence (ontological.material), individual scale, and sensory perception. It implies a persistent, predictable movement (temporal.continuation, lawfulness.predictable) with a superficial yet tangible presence (resonance.superficial). Scores dip to 0 for most slots due to its narrow, concrete meaning tied to bodily motion, avoiding abstract or systemic implications.

The verb 'limp' (as in proceeding weakly) strongly resonates with physical, individual-scale actions (scale.individual, ontological.material). It is directly perceived (epistemological.perception) and identifies a specific movement (epistemological.identification). The experience is bodily (epistemological.experience) and operates independently (interconnection.independent). Superficial resonance (resonance.superficial) reflects its surface-level physicality. Predictable (lawfulness.predictable) when injury occurs, contingent (lawfulness.contingent) on conditions like pain, and slightly destructive (symmetry.destructive) as a hindrance to smooth motion.

The word 'move' in the SOC.pass context (proceeding through) strongly resonates with **ontological.material** (physical action), **lawfulness.predictable** (expected motion), and **value_generation.functional** (practical utility). It also connects moderately to **temporal.transformation** (leading to change), **interconnection.independent** (acting alone), and **resonance.superficial** (surface-level action).

The highest scores reflect the physical (material) nature of 'pass' as movement, its functional utility (e.g., passing a test), and its structural and causal connections (e.g., pathways, cause-effect chains). Lower scores align with the absence of existential or ethical resonance, and the avoidance of over-scoring per the symmetric pair SOC.obstruct.

The verb 'pass' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material), sensory perception (epistemological.perception), and predictable action (lawfulness.predictable). It operates at individual/community scales and generates functional utility. Structural resonance and generative symmetry reflect its role in creating motion and progression.

The strongest resonances are in perception (direct sensory awareness of movement), material ontology (physical action), and functional value (practical utility of moving through space). Predictable lawfulness reflects routine paths. Scores drop where connections are vague or conflict with the symmetric pair [SOC.obstruct].

The word 'passer' strongly resonates with ontological.material (physical entity moving) and scale.individual (single entity). Scores for epistemological.identification (naming the entity) and symmetry.generative (enabling movement) are high. Lower scores reflect weak but real connections to influence over time, relational dynamics, and lawful predictability.

The passport's core function aligns with SOC.pass as it enables passage (symmetry.generative 8). It is a material object (material:10) tied to individual identity (scale.individual:10) and societal systems (scale.society:10). Its semantic value (7) reflects its role in enabling travel, and functional utility (10) is central. Temporal aspects like issuance (emergence:2) and renewal (continuation:3) are minor. Catalytic (5) and chained (4) scores reflect its role in travel processes.

Procedure resonates strongly with structural organization (ontological.structural), predictable steps (lawfulness.predictable), and functional utility (value_generation.functional). It also aligns with established processes (temporal.establishment), societal scales (scale.society), and chained cause-effect sequences (interconnection.chained).

Proceed strongly resonates with functional utility (7) as it emphasizes practical action. It scores highly in material (5) for physical movement, continuation (5) as ongoing action, chained (5) for cause-effect sequences, independent (5) as self-driven, and predictable (5) for following patterns. Moderate scores reflect its role in structured processes (structural 3), experiential knowing (3), and pattern-based resonance (3).

The word 'proceeding' strongly resonates with functional value (practical utility) and temporal continuation (ongoing process). It moderately aligns with proceeding as an experience (lived process), following predictable patterns, and having a transformative effect as part of moving through something.

Proceedings resonate most with structural organization (ontological.structural), societal processes (scale.society), and functional utility (value_generation.functional). They reflect ongoing processes (temporal.continuation) and depend on conditions (lawfulness.contingent). Scores are low elsewhere due to the word's focus on procedural records rather than existential or obstructive dynamics.

Procession strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material) and structural organization (ontological.structural). Its essential movement (resonance.essential) and aesthetic qualities (value_generation.aesthetic) are core. Predictable paths (lawfulness.predictable) and communal scale (scale.community) align with its orderly, purposeful motion.

The phrase 'put through' in the SOC.pass context resonates most strongly with interconnection.catalytic (triggering progress), ontological.relational (facilitating relationships), value.functional (practical utility), and symmetry.transformative (enabling change). It also connects to temporal.continuation (ongoing process) and scale.individual/community (acting on personal/group levels).

The verb 'roar' (as SOC.pass) strongly resonates with sensory perception (epistemological.perception 5) and material existence (ontological.material 5). It suggests movement through sound's physical presence and catalyzes change (symmetry.transformative 3). Scores reflect its role as an active, embodied signal (experience.creation 3) and its predictable yet impactful influence (lawfulness.predictable 3). Lower scores reflect its lack of connection to broader systemic or existential themes.

The phrase 'run by' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material) and sensory perception (epistemological.perception). It operates at individual and ecosystem scales, and can catalyze change (interconnection.catalytic) or persist predictably (lawfulness.predictable). Lower scores reflect its lack of deep existential or ethical resonance.

Safe-conduct strongly resonates with enabling individual passage (scale.individual:10), material form (ontological.material:10), and functional utility (value_generation.functional:10). It also connects to relational dynamics (ontological.relational:5), inclusive symmetry (symmetry.inclusive:5), and essential resonance (resonance.essential:5). Most other slots score 0 due to lack of direct or strong semantic ties.

Safeguard as a noun in SOC.pass context resonates most with practical utility (functional value), physical/structural protections (material/structural ontologies), and enabling smooth passage by counteracting obstruction (generative symmetry, structural resonance). Lower scores reflect its role in societal systems and contingent conditions, but not existential or aesthetic domains.

Safeguard resonates most with enabling passage through protective measures (symmetry.generative, ontological.layers), operating across scales (individual/society), and ensuring continuity (temporal.continuation). Functional and ethical values reflect practical and moral dimensions of protection.

Skirt (v) as moving past/through strongly resonates with physical action (ontological.material 5) and individual agency (scale.individual 2). It also connects to predictable behavior (lawfulness.predictable 2), superficial resonance (resonance.superficial 2), and practical utility (value.functional 3). Ethical considerations (value.ethical 1) and relational dynamics (ontological.relational 2) are weaker but present.

Steamroll strongly resonates with material (physical force), destructive (forceful movement), functional (practical utility), and chained (cause-effect propagation). It also connects to essential resonance (core essence of forceful progression) and temporal continuation (ongoing motion). Lower scores reflect direct sensory perception (e.g., a steamroller's movement) and relational/structural aspects of moving through systems.

The steamroller's unstoppable forward motion strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material 10), functional utility (value_generation.functional 10), and the destructive aspect of forceful progression (symmetry.destructive 7). Its metaphorical use ties to semantic meaning (ontological.semantic 7) and essential resonance (resonance.essential 8). The steamroller's persistent movement aligns with temporal transformation (3) and continuation (2), and its independent operation (interconnection.independent 6) contrasts with its catalytic effect on surroundings (interconnection.catalytic 5).

Steamroller as a verb in the SOC.pass context emphasizes forceful, unstoppable progression through obstacles. This aligns strongly with material ontology (physical action), destructive symmetry (crushing resistance), and essential resonance (core essence of overwhelming force). It resonates moderately with societal scale (e.g., policies steamrolling opposition) and ethical value (implications of moral overreach).

Surpass resonates most strongly with physical movement (ontological.material), personal achievement (scale.individual), transformative outcomes (symmetry.transformative), and practical utility (value.functional). Lower scores reflect indirect connections to catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic), unexpected occurrences (lawfulness.emergent), and aesthetic value (value.aesthetic).

The verb 'trace' (as moving through/along a path) strongly resonates with material/structural layers (physical paths), functional utility (practical navigation), and temporal continuity. Perception/experience scores reflect sensory engagement with the path. Lower scores acknowledge its independence from large-scale systems or ethical/aesthetic dimensions.

The verb 'travel by' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material 10) and the embodied experience of motion (epistemological.experience 5). It emphasizes functional utility (value_generation.functional 7) and the essential nature of proceeding through space (resonance.essential 5). Temporal.continuation (3) reflects ongoing motion, while symmetry.transformative (3) suggests catalyzing change through movement.

Venture as a noun in the SOC.pass context (moving past/through) strongly resonates with transformational and structural aspects (ontological.structural 2, resonance.essential 3, symmetry.transformative 3, symmetry.generative 3). It emphasizes experiential discovery (experience.discovery 3) and functional value (value.functional 3), while its contingent nature (lawfulness.contingent 3) reflects dependence on conditions. Scores are low elsewhere due to focus on the core dynamic of proceeding through challenges without broader resonance.

Venture strongly resonates with 'experience.discovery' (8) as it implies exploring the unknown. It aligns with 'ontological.material' (5) due to physical movement, and 'symmetry.transformative' (4) as venturing catalyzes change. Lower scores reflect its focus on individual action (scale.individual=2) and contingent circumstances (lawfulness.contingent=3).

Venturer strongly resonates with scale.individual (8) as it denotes a solitary actor. Experience.discovery (8) reflects venturing's core as exploration. Symmetry.transformative (7) and generative (6) highlight the creation of change and new paths. Resonance.essential (6) captures the core essence of venturing. Functional value (5) and semantic meaning (5) tie to practical utility and conceptual significance. Lower scores reflect minimal ties to other slots.

Wander resonates most with physical movement (ontological.material), individual scale, and the aesthetic value of exploration. It suggests ongoing motion (temporal.continuation) and discovery (experience.discovery), while its structural resonance reflects paths taken. Lower scores reflect its lack of systemic or existential depth.

The phrase 'whisk by' strongly resonates with physical movement (ontological.material), sensory perception (epistemological.perception), and transient, surface-level actions (resonance.superficial). It operates on an individual scale and can catalyze minor changes (interconnection.catalytic) while being predictably common (lawfulness.predictable). Aesthetic value (value_generation.aesthetic) arises from the graceful or swift nature of the action.

Work in the SOC.pass sense (moving through/progressing) strongly resonates with functional utility (value.functional), generative outcomes (symmetry.generative), and material/structural aspects (ontological.material/structural). It also connects weakly to temporal influence (over time) and catalytic processes (triggering progress).

The word 'work' in this context strongly resonates with material and functional aspects (physical movement and utility). Perception and experience scores reflect embodied action. Interconnection scores highlight individual agency and cause-effect chains. Weak transformative symmetry acknowledges potential for change without over-scoring.

The strong resonance with 'ontological.material' (10) reflects the physical, tangible nature of swift movement. 'epistemological.perception' (8) and 'epistemological.experience' (6) highlight the direct sensory and embodied nature of observing or enacting quick motion. 'value_generation.functional' (7) and 'lawfulness.predictable' (5) align with the practical utility and expected patterns of motion. Scores for 'interconnection.independent' (5) and 'symmetry.generative' (3) reflect self-contained action and forward momentum, contrasting with the obstructive symmetric pair.
